When to use:

Diagnose and improve PHP persistence performance with Doctrine ORM, Eloquent, DBAL, PDO, transactions, and connection pools. Use when fixing slow queries, N+1 loading, missing indexes, transaction boundaries, eager loading mistakes, batch writes, or database connection exhaustion.
